sys_script_fix.description:
2.8 Fix Script to populate OU ancestors on the OU 2.8.5 | 2023-06-23 | RAJ | DFCT0011726 - Name updated to 2.8.5 2.8.1 | 2023-03-17 | RAJ | STRY0137140 - Master Story for "Task Manager Dashboard"- All Performance Improvement and Clean up Changes
NOTE: this may have been applied in hotfix. If the customer applied i a hotfix, the OU field u_all_ancestors_orgainizatoins will have some rows populuated on install. It will NOT hur anything to run this again. IF NOT run with hotfix, you MUST run this for reports to work correctly. // NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product
Release Introduced: 2.8.1 - Only needs to be run a single time
Purpose: - This script adds the list of ancestor Organizational Units for each Organizational Unit. - The 2.8 release uses the field to vastly improve performance. - The field did not exist before 2.8. - All scripts were updated to use this when checking ancestors - All CRUD scripts were updated to set this value when it changes.
Validation: - Open the Organizational Hierarchy Table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy_list.do - Add the All Ancestors organizations field "All Ancestors organizations" to the list - Add the OU Parent field "OU Parent" to the list - Filter to show where "All Ancestors organizations" is empty fields and "OU Parent" is NOT Empty
Result - there should be zero records returned
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "OU Name:[ouName] - - Error in '2.8.1 - Fix Script - OU Ancestors' - exception: " + error
If any values exist, the script didn't update all OUs correctly.
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.1 - Fix Script - OU Ancestors
